steps.title: Apply the conversion factor
steps.content:
Since 1 mile equals 1,760 yards, converting 21.400 miles per hour to yards per hour requires multiplying:
$$21.400 \text{ miles/hour} \times 1,760 \text{ yards/mile} = 21.400 \times 1,760 \text{ yards/hour}$$

steps.title: Calculate the product
steps.content:
Break down the multiplication: $21 \times 1,760 = 36,960$ and $0.400 \times 1,760 = 704$.
Therefore: $36,960 + 704 = 37,664$ yards per hour.
